payload.answer: Recall selected mem_new because it is the durable, current memory for Sam from Goldman. mem_old was not returned because it is superseded by mem_new, so presenting mem_old as current would be incorrect.
payload.decision: Recall returned mem_new because it is the current, non-superseded memory matching Sam from Goldman; mem_old was excluded because it has been superseded by mem_new.

entity_resolution.reason: The query context identifies Sam from Goldman; among matching memories, mem_new is current while mem_old is marked superseded.

memory_cards.statement: mem_new is the active memory for Sam from Goldman and was therefore returned by recall.
mem_old matched the query context but was filtered out because it is superseded and should not be presented as current.

details: Returned only the active memory mem_new.
Did not present superseded content as current.

repair_options: If mem_old was incorrectly marked superseded, remove or revise the supersession link.
If mem_new is inaccurate, correct or delete mem_new and re-evaluate whether mem_old should become active again.
If Sam from Goldman refers to multiple people, add distinguishing entity metadata before recalling.
